title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama for local LLM chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embeddings support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API; chat, pull, and list models idiomatically.

title: ollama-azure-iot
summary: Microsoft sample showing how to run Ollama on Azure IoT Edge for offline AI on edge devices.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI with fuzzy-find model picker, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses a local Ollama model for code completions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by the community to use Ollama models in semantic search & QA pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Curated recipes for deploying, fine-tuning, and integrating Ollama with popular frameworks.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for running Ollama in Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and module for declarative Ollama deployments on NixOS.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) with multi-arch support for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js middleware that exposes an OpenAI-compatible REST API on top of Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server using Ollama.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app with admin UI and REST endpoints for managing and chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Qt6 and Python; supports multiple concurrent chats.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama API with tokio and serde.
